creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You need to install an "upgrade kit" (see www.freebsd.org/ports) if 
you want to run newer ports on a release system.  Also, you are probably 
not cvsupping the whole tree (the build is complaining about qt140 not being 
there, is qt141 there?).
